message:
feat(tools,conformance): add queue health to health_check, simplify WBQ fallbacks, update conformance fixtures

Tools (mcp-agent-mail-tools):
- Add QueuesHealthResponse with WBQ and commit coalescer sub-sections to
  health_check output (depth, capacity, utilization, peak, latency percentiles,
  error counts, backpressure totals, over-80% warning duration)
- Simplify WBQ enqueue fallback: remove synchronous fallback writes in
  identity, messaging, and reservations tools — log warning and skip
  archive write when WBQ is unavailable (DB remains source of truth)
- Ensure wbq_start() and get_commit_coalescer() are called in health_check
  so capacity/soft-cap values are stable before the first write/commit

Conformance:
- Add wbq_flush() + flush_async_commits() calls before archive artifact
  assertions to ensure async WBQ/coalescer writes are visible on disk
- Update python_reference.json fixture with queues health check response
  shape and relaxed-match paths for all queue metric fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
